sections.heading: Page 1
paragraphs:
GovSecure | AI Use Case Intake Form
GOVSECURE | CHECKLIST & QUESTIONNAIRE LIBRARY
AI Use Case Intake Form
Standard intake, triage, and approval form for proposed or materially changed AI use
cases.
Version: 1.0 Classification: Confidential Owner: AI Governance Lead
Use this form to capture the business purpose, data profile, risk triggers, and approval conditions
for any new or materially changed AI activity. It is designed to help SMBs review quickly without
turning governance into paperwork theater.
Prepared for: {{COMPANY_NAME}}
Confidential - Controlled | Page 1

sections.heading: Page 2
paragraphs:
GovSecure | AI Use Case Intake Form
1. Overview
This intake form is the standard entry point for reviewing AI use cases before approval, expansion, or
material change. It creates a consistent record for business, IT, security, privacy, legal, and compliance
reviewers.
2. When to use this form
 New AI tools, copilots, agents, assistants, or AI-enabled features.
 Material changes to an already approved use case, such as new data types, new vendors, new users, or
customer-facing deployment.
 Third-party AI tools that will process company, employee, customer, supplier, or partner data.
 Pilots, proofs of concept, or experiments that may move into production.
3. Fast triage outcomes
Outcome Meaning Typical treatment
Low-risk internal use with no
Approve with standard guardrails
Fast-track sensitive data and no high-impact
and enter in registry.

Cross-functional review; additional
Escalated review automated decisions, or unclear
controls or restriction may apply.
vendor posture.
4. Completion instructions
 The requester completes Sections A-H before submission.
 The reviewer or governance lead completes Sections I-K during triage.
 Be specific. Short vague answers create longer review cycles.
 If the use case is already live, state that clearly and provide the current state in the business
justification.
5. Section A - Request profile
Use Case ID {{ID}} Date Submitted {{DATE}}
Business Owner {{OWNER_NAME}} Department / Function {{DEPARTMENT}}
Requester Name {{REQUESTER_NAME}} Requester Email {{EMAIL}}
Implementation Stage Idea / Pilot / Live / Change Target Decision Date {{TARGET_DATE}}

10. Section F - Risk screening questions
Check all triggers that apply. Any single high-impact trigger may require escalated review.

Yes / No {{OPTIONAL_NOTE}}

training, or shared with Yes / No {{OPTIONAL_NOTE}}

jurisdictions with privacy or sector- Yes / No {{OPTIONAL_NOTE}}

material operational, legal, or Yes / No {{OPTIONAL_NOTE}}

Escalate immediately if the use case involves sensitive data, customer-facing decisions, HR or
employment impact, legal interpretation, payments, safety, or any automated action without reliable
human review.
